obra--superpowers-skills.name: Getting Started with Skills
obra--superpowers-skills.description: Skills wiki intro - mandatory workflows, search tool, brainstorming triggers

obra--superpowers-skills.name: When Stuck - Problem-Solving Dispatch
obra--superpowers-skills.description: Dispatch to the right problem-solving technique based on how you're stuck

obra--superpowers-skills.name: Scale Game
obra--superpowers-skills.description: Test at extremes (1000x bigger/smaller, instant/year-long) to expose fundamental truths hidden at normal scales

obra--superpowers-skills.name: Collision-Zone Thinking
obra--superpowers-skills.description: Force unrelated concepts together to discover emergent properties - "What if we treated X like Y?"

obra--superpowers-skills.name: Simplification Cascades
obra--superpowers-skills.description: Find one insight that eliminates multiple components - "if this is true, we don't need X, Y, or Z"

obra--superpowers-skills.name: Meta-Pattern Recognition
obra--superpowers-skills.description: Spot patterns appearing in 3+ domains to find universal principles

obra--superpowers-skills.name: Inversion Exercise
obra--superpowers-skills.description: Flip core assumptions to reveal hidden constraints and alternative approaches - "what if the opposite were true?"

obra--superpowers-skills.name: Preserving Productive Tensions
obra--superpowers-skills.description: Recognize when disagreements reveal valuable context, preserve multiple valid approaches instead of forcing premature resolution

obra--superpowers-skills.name: Systematic Debugging
obra--superpowers-skills.description: Four-phase debugging framework that ensures root cause investigation before attempting fixes. Never jump to solutions.

obra--superpowers-skills.name: Defense-in-Depth Validation
obra--superpowers-skills.description: Validate at every layer data passes through to make bugs impossible

obra--superpowers-skills.name: Verification Before Completion
obra--superpowers-skills.description: Run verification commands and confirm output before claiming success

obra--superpowers-skills.name: Root Cause Tracing
obra--superpowers-skills.description: Systematically trace bugs backward through call stack to find original trigger

obra--superpowers-skills.name: Tracing Knowledge Lineages
obra--superpowers-skills.description: Understand how ideas evolved over time to find old solutions for new problems and avoid repeating past failures

obra--superpowers-skills.name: Test-Driven Development (TDD)
obra--superpowers-skills.description: Write the test first, watch it fail, write minimal code to pass

obra--superpowers-skills.name: Testing Anti-Patterns
